label: Glower comp
description: Adds a light source to the thing.

overlightRadius.label: Overlight radius
overlightRadius.description: Radius of the area that receives extra lighting beyond the normal glow.

glowRadius.label: Glow radius
glowRadius.description: Radius of the glow in cells. Maximum 40.

glowColor.label: Glow color
glowColor.description: RGBA color of the glow as (R,G,B,A) with values 0-255.

colorPickerEnabled.label: Color picker enabled
colorPickerEnabled.description: Whether colonists can recolor the glow.

darklightToggle.label: Darklight toggle
darklightToggle.description: Whether colonists can toggle between normal light and dark light.

overrideIsCavePlant.label: Override is cave plant
overrideIsCavePlant.description: Whether this overrides the cave plant light check.
